/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -m64 CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_sf.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_airy.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_bessel.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_coulomb.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_dilog.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_gamma.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_hermite.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_hyperg.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_legendre.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_mathieu.c.o CMakeFiles/specfunc_test.dir/specfunc/test_sincos_pi.c.o -o bin/specfunc_test  libgsl.a libgslcblas.a -lm
